sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, haystack String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'abc=111, def=222, ghi=333'), (2, 'a=1, b=2, c=3'), (3, NULL), (4, 'x=10, y=20, z=30');
SELECT id, extractAllGroupsVertical(haystack, '"([^"]+)"=([0-9]+)') AS groups FROM test_strings WHERE haystack IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (x -> extractAllGroupsVertical(haystack, '"([^"]+)"=([0-9]+)'))(haystack) AS groups FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, (x -> (SELECT extractAllGroupsVertical(haystack, '"(\w+)"=([0-9]+)') FROM test_strings WHERE id = x))(id) AS sub_groups FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (number_id Int32, num_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, extractAllGroupsVertical(CAST(num_value AS String), '([0-9]+)') AS extracted FROM test_numbers WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (x -> extractAllGroupsVertical(haystack, '\w+=\d+'))(haystack) AS matches FROM test_strings WHERE haystack NOT LIKE '%xyz%';
CREATE TABLE test_join (join_id Int32, join_value String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT ts.id, tj.join_value, (x -> extractAllGroupsVertical(ts.haystack, '"([^"]+)"=([0-9]{1,3})'))(ts.haystack) FROM test_strings ts JOIN test_join tj ON ts.id = tj.join_id;

SELECT ts.id, (x -> (SELECT extractAllGroupsVertical(haystack, '"([^"]+)"=([0-9]+)') FROM test_strings WHERE id = x))(id) AS nested_groups FROM test_strings ts JOIN test_join tj ON ts.id = tj.join_id GROUP BY ts.id HAVING nested_groups[1] IS NOT NULL;
SELECT ts.id, arrayJoin(extractAllGroupsVertical(haystack, '"(\w+)"=([0-9]+)')) AS expanded_groups FROM test_strings ts ORDER BY expanded_groups[2] DESC;
CREATE TABLE test_mixed (m_id Int32, mixed_value String, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_mixed VALUES (1, 'data1=999', now()), (2, 'data2=123', now()), (3, NULL, now());
SELECT m.m_id, extractAllGroupsVertical(mixed_value, '([a-z]+)=([0-9]+)') AS mixed_groups FROM test_mixed m WHERE mixed_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT m_id, extractAllGroupsVertical(mixed_value, '([a-z]+)=([0-9]+)') AS result FROM test_mixed HAVING length(result) > 0;
